title: angelica multisecta
intro: Angelica multisecta, also known as Chinese angelica, is a type of plant that belongs to the carrot family and is native to China. The root of the plant is used in traditional medicine and is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Angelica multisecta include reducing fever, relieving pain and menstrual cramps, and improving blood circulation. The herbal preparations of the plant include dried root, tincture, and tea, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
